summary: Alignment digest notifications and new filtering capabilities on the CCH Alignment Report.

updates.title: Alignment Digest — Email Notifications
updates.body: Manufacturer, Hub, and SP users can now receive scheduled email digests (daily or weekly) summarizing new consent gaps and misalignments by data source, with deep links to filtered Alignment Report views.

updates.title: In-App Notifications
updates.body: A new in-app notification alerts users to new consent gaps as they occur, with a direct link to the Alignment Report.

updates.title: Consent Status Filter
updates.body: Users can now filter the Alignment Report by consent status (Valid Consent / No Consent) within the SP filter.

updates.title: Alignment Report — Consent Updated Filter
updates.body: The CCH Alignment Report now supports filtering by Consent Updated date, making it easier to surface and review recent consent changes.

updates.title: Brand Filter
updates.body: Fixed an issue where the brand filter on the Consent Dashboard was not applying correctly when a brand was deselected.

updates.title: Access Control
updates.body: Fixed an issue where FRM and Field Team Sales users were able to view patient consent information and patient IDs on the CCH Dashboard.
